summary: Completed comprehensive testing of teacher editing functionality in admin panel. All features working correctly including edit sheets, avatar selection, status dropdown, and CRUD operations.
passed_tests: POST /api/admin/teachers - creates new teacher with avatar
PUT /api/admin/teachers/{id} - updates teacher (name, email, status, avatar)
All 4 status options work: Зарегистрирован, В процессе, Завершено обучение, Заблокирован
Click teacher row opens edit sheet with current data
Edit sheet shows avatar selection grid (12 options)
Edit sheet shows status dropdown in edit mode only
Add teacher sheet hides status dropdown correctly
Avatar selection works in both create and edit modes
Upload photo button present in both forms
Form validation prevents empty required fields
Teacher changes save and reflect in table immediately
Create teacher saves with default 'in_progress' status
Edit teacher saves all field changes correctly
Teachers table updates with new/changed data
